_meta.description: Modify an existing user's profile in YeshID. Searches for the user, opens their detail page, updates specified fields, and saves.

paramNotes.user_identifier: Name or email to find the user
paramNotes.fields: Object of field names to new values, e.g. { 'first_name': 'Jane', 'company_email': 'jane@example.com' }

chain.code: (function() { const rows = [...document.querySelectorAll('table tbody tr')]; const match = rows.find(r => r.textContent.toLowerCase().includes('{{user_identifier}}'.toLowerCase())); if (!match) return { found: false, error: 'User not found' }; const link = match.querySelector('a[href]'); if (link) { link.click(); return { found: true, href: link.href }; } match.click(); return { found: true }; })()
chain.note: Find and click into person detail page.

chain.code: (function() { function clearAndType(input, value) { input.focus(); input.select(); const nativeInputValueSetter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; nativeInputValueSetter.call(input, value); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); return true; } function findVuetifyInput(labelTerms) { return [...document.querySelectorAll('.v-input, .v-field')].map(c => { const label = c.querySelector('.v-label, .v-field-label'); const input = c.querySelector('input, textarea'); if (!label || !input) return null; const t = label.textContent.trim().toLowerCase(); const score = labelTerms.filter(term => t.includes(term.toLowerCase())).length; return score > 0 ? { input, score } : null; }).filter(Boolean).sort((a,b) => b.score - a.score)[0]?.input; } const updates = {}; const firstName = '{{new_first_name}}'; const lastName = '{{new_last_name}}'; const personalEmail = '{{new_personal_email}}'; if (firstName) { const el = findVuetifyInput(['first name']); if (el) { clearAndType(el, firstName); updates.first_name = true; } } if (lastName) { const el = findVuetifyInput(['last name']); if (el) { clearAndType(el, lastName); updates.last_name = true; } } if (personalEmail) { const el = findVuetifyInput(['personal', 'recovery']); if (el) { clearAndType(el, personalEmail); updates.personal_email = true; } } return updates; })()
chain.note: Update all provided fields using Vuetify label-based resolution in a single JS step.
